notes: All-in cash operating cost (excludes depreciation). Per-trip derived from GTFS weekday trips × calendar service days. Per-pax derived from 2024 ridership snapshot × 260 weekdays.
source: SEPTA Route Operating Statistics FY2024 Budgeted — https://opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/26f40aaeb8ae41d291878ba726b57fed_0.csv
